name: Alex AI
tagline: An AI-powered chatbot that holds human-like conversations, answers questions, and runs basic automation tasks through natural language processing.

name: Echo – Personal AI Assistant
tagline: A self-hosted AI assistant inspired by Iron Man's J.A.R.V.I.S. and F.R.I.D.A.Y., built for natural, voice-driven conversations. Runs on Ollama with locally hosted LLMs for full privacy and control, exposed securely over the internet via Cloudflare Tunnel with Zero Trust authentication.

name: Curfew E-Pass Management System
tagline: A web-based system that automates the issuance and verification of electronic travel passes during curfew restrictions, letting authorities manage approvals and track authorized movements securely instead of relying on paper.

name: Moviety
tagline: A movie information platform where users browse, search, and view details, ratings, and trailers, pulling real-time data from third-party APIs.

name: Shipment Tracker
tagline: An automated workflow that tracks shipment status and sends real-time updates and notifications, so no one has to check carriers manually.

name: Client Payment Proof Processing
tagline: A workflow that receives client payment proofs, uses AI and OCR to read and extract the payment details, records them automatically, and notifies the team, removing manual checking and encoding.

name: Real Estate Automation
tagline: Automated workflows for real estate operations that capture and manage leads and inquiries, sync data with the CRM, and handle follow-ups automatically.

name: Customer Support Automation
tagline: An AI-powered support workflow that receives customer inquiries, responds to common questions automatically, and routes the rest to the right person with real-time notifications.

name: Smart Email Assistant
tagline: An AI assistant connected to Gmail that reads incoming emails, categorizes them, and prepares responses and notifications automatically to keep the inbox under control.
